form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at Hawera on March 25 over 2100m, 1.0 len behind Up With Ace carrying 56.5kg at $18.60. Previously second-up eased back early on 6th of 8 at Ruakaka Mdn-Sw on January 6 over 2100m, slow going 11 len behind Dream Maker carrying 55.5kg at $13.60. Looks set for another big run.
